name: generate_ids
description: Generates a set of file ids which can be provided in create or copy requests. use when you need to pre-allocate ids for new files or copies.

type.description:
The type of items for which the IDs can be used. For example, 'files' or 'shortcuts'.
Example: "files"

count.description:
The number of IDs to return. Value must be between 1 and 1000, inclusive.
Example: 10

space.description:
The space in which the IDs can be used. Supported values are 'drive' and 'appDataFolder'.
Example: "drive"
